scheme_name: 100 Dial Scheme
description: This scheme was launched by the CM of Haryana at Panchkula. He also inaugurated eight Mitra Kaksh in Civil Lines Police. On the occasion, he said their government is providing a fearless environment to the people of the state. He also said that these eight Mitra Kaksh have been established at the cost of Rs. 2 crores to develop coordination among police and people.
full_text:
100 Dial Scheme
This scheme was launched by the CM of Haryana at Panchkula. He also inaugurated eight Mitra Kaksh in Civil Lines Police. On the occasion, he said their government is providing a fearless environment to the people of the state. He also said that these eight Mitra Kaksh have been established at the cost of Rs. 2 crores to develop coordination among police and people.

In all the eight Mitra Kaksh, the officer of police and the members of Community Liaison Group will sit in these Mitra Kaksh without uniform. These officers will listen to the grievances of people and try to solve the grievance through mediation. If a grievance could not be solved through mediation then FIR will be registered against the person.
The state government has informed that the first phase of eight Mitra Kaksh is being established in Karnal and Rohtak districts. However, More Mitra Kaksh will establish throughout the state but after the success of the first phase.

Moreover, the state government will provide a safe environment in these Mitra Kaksh where the victims will present their views and share their problems without any hesitation.

scheme_name: 7 Star Village Scheme – Details
description: Haryana govt. will identify these gram panchayats in every district after assessment of work details and developmental activities carried out them in their respective villages. Subsequently, each village will get incentives on the basis of star color assigned to them.
full_text:
7 Star Village Scheme – Details
Haryana govt. will identify these gram panchayats in every district after assessment of work details and developmental activities carried out them in their respective villages. Subsequently, each village will get incentives on the basis of star color assigned to them.

The state govt. will assign star ratings on the basis of developmental activities taking place in villages. Henceforth, this scheme will promote “Ease of Living” in villages and improve living standards of rural people.
7 Star Village scheme will improve sex ratio, cleanliness, reduce drop out rates, good governance, environment protection activities in villages. Furthermore, Haryana govt. will honour these villages on 23 March 2018 as per their star ratings.

description: The food packets under the Annapurna Akshya Patra Yojana are being distributed daily from 6 pm to 9 pm at following locations 1. Vegetable mandi (Transport Area), Sector 26 2. Labour Chowk, Manimajra 3. Labour Chowk, (Near EWS Colony), Dhanas 4. Labour Chowk, Ram Darbar 5. Labour Colony No. 4, Industrial Area, Phase 1
full_text:
Annapurna Akshya Patra Yojana – Locations
The food packets under the Annapurna Akshya Patra Yojana are being distributed daily from 6 pm to 9 pm at following locations
1. Vegetable mandi (Transport Area), Sector 26
2. Labour Chowk, Manimajra
3. Labour Chowk, (Near EWS Colony), Dhanas
4. Labour Chowk, Ram Darbar
5. Labour Colony No. 4, Industrial Area, Phase 1

The project was initiated by Indian Red Cross Society, Chandigarh, to provide affordable, hygienic and nutritious diet to people. UT administration of Chandigarh has setup a kitchen at a total cost of Rs. 70 lakh at Karuna Sadan Building, Sector 11-B where the food packets would be prepared under the scheme.

scheme_name: Apply Online for Parivar Pehchan Patra
description: Though, the state government has launched the portal for online registration of Parivar Pehchan Patra but there is no procedure / link available for online application by the general public. However, the applications by the general public for Parivar Pehchan Patra can be submitted at the Common Service Centers, Saral Kenrda and Tehsil Offices and then the operator will register the family on the portal. The operator will fill all the details of the family on the Parivar Pehchan Patra Portal and provide a unique Family ID after the successful registration / approval and verification.
full_text:
Apply Online for Parivar Pehchan Patra
Though, the state government has launched the portal for online registration of Parivar Pehchan Patra but there is no procedure / link available for online application by the general public.
However, the applications by the general public for Parivar Pehchan Patra can be submitted at the Common Service Centers, Saral Kenrda and Tehsil Offices and then the operator will register the family on the portal. The operator will fill all the details of the family on the Parivar Pehchan Patra Portal and provide a unique Family ID after the successful registration / approval and verification.
The Family ID cards will be issued within few days after the successful registration.
At this portal, people can check how to apply online for disability, widow and old age pension schemes. Accordingly, operators at CSCs can then fill pension schemes application form online.

scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat Haryana Portal for Health Protection – Features
description: People can avail various benefits at the Ayushman Bharat Haryana Portal. The important features and highlights of HRY-NHA Portal are as follows:-
full_text:
Ayushman Bharat Haryana Portal for Health Protection – Features
People can avail various benefits at the Ayushman Bharat Haryana Portal. The important features and highlights of HRY-NHA Portal are as follows:-

Hospital Empanelment – All the hospitals in Haryana can now make Online Empanelment to join the Ayushman Bharat Yojana in Haryana. Also download Hospital Empanelment User Manual
Hiring of Ayushman Mitra – The state govt. will hire various Ayushman Mitras to make people aware about the scheme and to assist them in their claims and registration process. To get selected as Ayushman Mitra, click the link – Haryana Ayushman Mitra Hiring (Work with NHA)
Download Documents – Download Essential documents to avail the treatment benefits under Ayushman Bharat Haryana Swasthya Suraksha Mission through the link – Ayushman Bharat Haryana Documents Download
Apply for NHA Internship Program in Haryana – All the interested candidates who wish to join NHA HRY Internship can apply online through the link – Haryana NHA Internship Program
Download Haryana Ayushman Bharat List of Beneficiaries – To avail cashless treatment, all the citizens can check whether their name appears in the list of beneficiaries. To Download the complete rural and urban list, click the link – Ayushman Bharat Haryana Beneficiary List
Feedback & Grievances – In case of any grievance, people can Contact Us using the link – Haryana Ayushman Bharat Complaints
Notifications Regarding PMRSSM – People can receive all new updates and notifications on the Ayushman Bharat Haryana Portal. To access the HRY-NHA notification page, click at HRY-NHA Notifications
Eligibility Criteria for Haryana AB-NHPM – People must fulfill the eligibility criteria to avail the benefits of Haryana Ayushman Bharat Yojana – Check Eligibility

scheme_name: Before applying for PM Awas Yojana online, please make sure that
description: – You are eligible to apply for the scheme (Check your name in the PMAY beneficiary list). – You have your Aadhar Number with you, Aadhar is mandatory for PMAY online application. – Your computer is connected to a reliable internet connection. – You have the details of your saving bank account with you. – You have the actual details of your household income.
full_text:
Before applying for PM Awas Yojana online, please make sure that
– You are eligible to apply for the scheme (Check your name in the PMAY beneficiary list).
– You have your Aadhar Number with you, Aadhar is mandatory for PMAY online application.
– Your computer is connected to a reliable internet connection.
– You have the details of your saving bank account with you.
– You have the actual details of your household income.

full_text:
Below are some of the highlights of Haryana Family ID Card scheme
Name of SchemeParivar Pehchan Patra (परिवार पहचान पत्र)StateHaryanaLaunched ByChief Minister Shri Manohar Lal KhattarObjectiveTo bring in transparency to government services and keep track of Haryana State dwellersBeneficiariesAbout 56 Lakh families of HaryanaApplication FormDownload Application FormApplication ModeOfflineOfficial Portalmeraparivar.haryana.gov.inScheme Last DateNo Last DateDocuments RequiredAadhar CardParivar Pehchan Patra (परिवार पहचान पत्र) Highlights
What is Parivar Pehchan Patra or Family ID Card
The family ID Card or Parivar Pehchan Patra which will be given to each registered family would contain a unique Family ID along with few other details such as the name of head of the family.
The Family ID Card could be used to avail benefits of verious Haryana government welfare schemes such as Disability Pension Scheme, Old Age Samman Allowance, Widow & Destitute Women Pension Scheme among few others.

scheme_name: Below are the important features and highlights of this scheme
description: This is an accident insurance scheme for traders, retailers, small shopkeepers, shop owners & self employed persons. Under this scheme, govt. will provide Rs. 5 lakh insurance cover in case of any accident. All the traders registered under Haryana Goods and Services Tax (HGST) Act 2017 would be covered under these schemes. Around 3.75 lakh traders would be its beneficiaries. The benefit of insurance would be admissible in case of accidental death, permanently disability and damage to two body organs, or eyes or one organ or one eye.
full_text:
Below are the important features and highlights of this scheme
This is an accident insurance scheme for traders, retailers, small shopkeepers, shop owners & self employed persons.
Under this scheme, govt. will provide Rs. 5 lakh insurance cover in case of any accident.
All the traders registered under Haryana Goods and Services Tax (HGST) Act 2017 would be covered under these schemes.
Around 3.75 lakh traders would be its beneficiaries.
The benefit of insurance would be admissible in case of accidental death, permanently disability and damage to two body organs, or eyes or one organ or one eye.

scheme_name: Benefits of Ekharid to Save Water – Jal Hi Jiwan Hai Haryana
description: The state govt. of Haryana has given assurance that the makka, arhar and other crops cultivated in place of rice crop would be procured by government agencies at minimum support prices.
full_text:
Benefits of Ekharid to Save Water – Jal Hi Jiwan Hai Haryana
The state govt. of Haryana has given assurance that the makka, arhar and other crops cultivated in place of rice crop would be procured by government agencies at minimum support prices.

फसल विविधीकरण के प्रति किसानों का रुझान बढ़ाने के लिए अब मक्का, अरहर, सोयाबीन और अन्य फसलों के लिए भी न्यूनतम मूल्य निर्धारित करेगी सरकार pic.twitter.com/JuU4a707zM
— CMO Haryana (@cmohry) May 26, 2019

The state govt. will provide high quality seeds absolutely free. The cost of seeds which would be provided by the govt. costs around Rs. 1200 to Rs. 2000 per acre in open market. The state govt. will provide Rs. 2000 per acre as subsidy (financial assistance) to farmers. In addition to this, the premium amount of the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY scheme) would be borne by the Haryana government.

Content Source / Reference Link: www.jalhijiwan.ekharid.in

scheme_name: Benefits of Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: An insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakh will be given to the person in case of accidental death.
full_text:
Benefits of Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
An insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakh will be given to the person in case of accidental death.

In case of complete loss of eye-sight of both eyes or loss of both hands/feet due to the accident, the scheme will provide an insurance amount of Rs. 2 lakh.
If the person loses his eye-sight of one eye or loses one hand/feet in the accident, an insurance cover of Rs. 1 lakh will be provided under the PMSBY scheme.

To get the above insurance covers, the applicants will have to pay the annual premium of Rs. 12 only.

D.Passport issued prior to 16.06.2016

scheme_name: Chatra Parivahan Suraksha Yojana
description: This scheme will provide free travelling facility to girls regardless of the number of students in an educational institution. The state govt. is making every possible effort to ensure safety and security of women. To successfully implement Chatra Parivahan Suraksha Yojana, govt. will appoint nodal officers whom the girls will be able to submit their requirements. Only 2 states – MP and Haryana has the provision of death penalty for raping a minor below 12 years of age. All the other state governments are also appreciating this step. Recently, Menka Gandhi has also made a statement regarding formation of a law at the national level to give death penalty in rape cases of minors below the age of 12 years. As another initiative, govt. is also taking steps to eliminate female foeticide from the state. Social organizations must work in collaboration with the state govt. to deal with such evils prevailing in the society.
full_text:
Chatra Parivahan Suraksha Yojana
This scheme will provide free travelling facility to girls regardless of the number of students in an educational institution. The state govt. is making every possible effort to ensure safety and security of women. To successfully implement Chatra Parivahan Suraksha Yojana, govt. will appoint nodal officers whom the girls will be able to submit their requirements.
Only 2 states – MP and Haryana has the provision of death penalty for raping a minor below 12 years of age. All the other state governments are also appreciating this step. Recently, Menka Gandhi has also made a statement regarding formation of a law at the national level to give death penalty in rape cases of minors below the age of 12 years. As another initiative, govt. is also taking steps to eliminate female foeticide from the state. Social organizations must work in collaboration with the state govt. to deal with such evils prevailing in the society.

Moreover, Beti Bachao Beti Padhao Abhiyan has resulted in improvement in sex ratio. Even there is reservation of 33% for women in elections to Panchayati Raj Institutions which has resulted in 42% women representatives in gram panchayats. After the launch of BBBP Scheme in Jhajjar, sex ratio is now improved from 824 to 920 girls per 1,000 boys.

full_text:
Credit Card
0.90%

Online stamp papers can be generated through e-Stamping immediately after the successful payment.
2. Manual Payment through E-GRAS Challan
The candidates can also make payments through demand draft or cash to any of the bank branches of SBI, IDBI, SBOP, PNB, CBI and concerned treasury bank branch. To make the offline manual payment, the person needs to generate the requisite challan from egrashry.nic.in and then he/she can generate the online stamp paper immediately after the successful manual payment.
Immediately after successful payments through any of the methods, the depositors can generate stamp papers online through egrashry.nic.in and then seek registration from the Revenue Authority by using HARIS portal. The revenue authority after verifying the payment through E-GRAS system shall register the document and the system will automatically deface the e-Stamp and corresponding Government Receipt Number (GRN) online to avoid duplicity.

scheme_name: Decision to make “Ex-Servicemen Welfare Department”.
description: Financial assistance being given to ex-servicemen, widows of ex-servicemen, physically disabled ex-servicemen, their orphans etc. increased. Compensation amount of those who lay down their lives during war increased to Rs. 50 Lakh. Weekly leave for all police personnel for the first time in the state. Swarna Jayanti Medals for all police officers/Personnel. Daily allowance of home guards increased to Rs. 572 per day, equivalent to police constables. full_text:
Decision to make “Ex-Servicemen Welfare Department”.
Financial assistance being given to ex-servicemen, widows of ex-servicemen, physically disabled ex-servicemen, their orphans etc. increased.
Compensation amount of those who lay down their lives during war increased to Rs. 50 Lakh.
Weekly leave for all police personnel for the first time in the state.
Swarna Jayanti Medals for all police officers/Personnel.
Daily allowance of home guards increased to Rs. 572 per day, equivalent to police constables.
Cycle and umbrella for chowkidars in rural areas.
Financial assistance for destitute children increased to Rs. 700 per month.
Financial assistance for non school going differently-abled children increased to Rs. 1000 per month.
Honorarium of Safai Karamcharis in rural areas increased to Rs. 10000 per month.
All these schemes were announced during the celebration of Haryana Swarna Utsav. The schemes will be effective from 1st November 2016.

scheme_name: Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana – Affordable Plotted Housing Policy – 2016
description: Under the Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana, all the projects are required to be completed within 7 years from the date of approval of license. In any residential sector not more than 30% of the net planned area under residential zone, inclusive of the 20% area limit allowed for group housing projects, can be allowed for projects under this policy. However, if a residential sector has an area of less than 50 acres, one such project shall be allowed upto 15 acres. 65% of the licensed area is the maximum allowed area under residential and commercial plots.
full_text:
Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana – Affordable Plotted Housing Policy – 2016
More details about the scheme can be obtained from the official website of TCP haryana at www.tcpharyana.gov.in

Features of Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana or Affordable Plotted Housing Policy 2016
Under the Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana, all the projects are required to be completed within 7 years from the date of approval of license.
In any residential sector not more than 30% of the net planned area under residential zone, inclusive of the 20% area limit allowed for group housing projects, can be allowed for projects under this policy. However, if a residential sector has an area of less than 50 acres, one such project shall be allowed upto 15 acres.
65% of the licensed area is the maximum allowed area under residential and commercial plots.
The minimum and maximum net planned area for such projects shall be 5 acres and 15 acres respectively irrespective of the Development Plan where such project is proposed. Not more than 10% of the licensed area should fall under sector roads.
Area under commercial use should not exceed 4% of the licensed area.
Minimum width of the roads in the colony should be 9 meters.
The first licence may be obtained for an area of 5 acres or more and additional license for minimum 2 acres can be obtained to take the aggregated area of colony upto 15 acres.
Minimum 7.5% of the licensed area should be kept as organized open space.
Registration of independent floors in plots shall be allowed.
Clubbing of residential plots for approval of integrated zoning plan of two adjoining plots under same ownership shall not be permitted in the colonies approved under the present policy.
Grant of licence shall be considered under this policy, initially, against 20% group housing area limit in such sector. Once the area under 20% limit stands exhausted on account of either group housing licences or affordable housing policy 2013 projects or under the present policy; grant of any further license under this policy shall be considered only upto a further limit of 10% of the net planned area under residential zone of such sector.

Under the Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana, max allowed area of the plot would be 150 Sq.Mt.. The minimum and maximum density per acre is 240 and 400 people respectively.

scheme_name: Durghatna Sahayata Bima Yojana Haryana
description: Previously, Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) provides an insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakh as assistance for accident with premium amount of Rs. 12. Accordingly, those people who are unable to pay the annual premium or not enrolled in that scheme can avail the benefits of this scheme. However, the compensation / assistance amount is reduced to Rs. 1 lakh under Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Durghatna Sahayata Yojana.
full_text:
Durghatna Sahayata Bima Yojana Haryana
Previously, Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) provides an insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakh as assistance for accident with premium amount of Rs. 12. Accordingly, those people who are unable to pay the annual premium or not enrolled in that scheme can avail the benefits of this scheme. However, the compensation / assistance amount is reduced to Rs. 1 lakh under Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Durghatna Sahayata Yojana.

Moreover, all the claims made after 6 months of death or 12 months from accident date (whichever is earlier) will not get entertained. This scheme will ensure social security of the families whose family members die due to accident.
In addition to this, people who have applied for this scheme cant make claim for this insurance in case of natural death. To avail the benefits of Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Durghatna Sahayata Yojana, the family of the victims can apply for financial assistance at the office of District Social Welfare officer.

scheme_name: Eligibility Criteria of PMSBY Haryana
description: To be eligible for the scheme, the applicant will have to fulfill the following eligibility of the insurance scheme. The applicant should be an adult (18+ Years) to get the insurance cover under the scheme. The maximum age to get the insurance cover in the scheme is 70 years (nearest birthday). The applicant must have a saving bank account linked with his/her Aadhaar Card. Aadhaar is a primary KYC for the bank account and insurance coverage.
full_text:
Eligibility Criteria of PMSBY Haryana
To be eligible for the scheme, the applicant will have to fulfill the following eligibility of the insurance scheme.
The applicant should be an adult (18+ Years) to get the insurance cover under the scheme.
The maximum age to get the insurance cover in the scheme is 70 years (nearest birthday).
The applicant must have a saving bank account linked with his/her Aadhaar Card. Aadhaar is a primary KYC for the bank account and insurance coverage.

scheme_name: Eligibility for PMAY Demand Survey in Haryana
description: Following candidates are eligible to submit their PMAY demand survey application:
documents: Following documents are required for submission of PMAY demand survey application form in Haryana
– Aadhar card and saving bank account for identity verification
– Voter ID, Telephone Bill, Electricity Bill, Ration Card, Passport, Bank Passbook, Pension Book, Aadhar Card or any government certified document for residence verification.
– Self declaration document of household income and eligibility on a plain paper along with latest passport size photograph.
– The layout of plot, home construction or expansion prepared and verified by draftsman/architect.
– Registration documents of plot or property sale-purchase documents, Jamabandi certificate, notarized receipt, or allotment letter issued by any government body or panchayat.
full_text:
Eligibility for PMAY Demand Survey in Haryana
Following candidates are eligible to submit their PMAY demand survey application:

The candidate should belong to any of the following income categories – EWS, LIG, MIG-1, MIG-2.
The applicant should have Aadhar Number and a bank account.
The applicant should not have any pucca house in any part of the country in his/her name or in the name of any family member.
He/She should not be a beneficiary of any government housing scheme in the past.
The applicant should be the resident or Haryana and respective town as on 17 June 2015 or an employee of government department, industrial unit or company registered with labor welfare board of Haryana.
Residents of unauthorized colonies who does not have pucca house are not eligible for the scheme.

Documents Required
Following documents are required for submission of PMAY demand survey application form in Haryana
– Aadhar card and saving bank account for identity verification
– Voter ID, Telephone Bill, Electricity Bill, Ration Card, Passport, Bank Passbook, Pension Book, Aadhar Card or any government certified document for residence verification.
– Self declaration document of household income and eligibility on a plain paper along with latest passport size photograph.
– The layout of plot, home construction or expansion prepared and verified by draftsman/architect.
– Registration documents of plot or property sale-purchase documents, Jamabandi certificate, notarized receipt, or allotment letter issued by any government body or panchayat.

scheme_name: Eligibility for Uchch Shiksha Loan Yojana
description: Below is the eligibility criteria for Haryana Higher Education Loan Scheme or Uchch Shiksha Loan Yojana
full_text:
Eligibility for Uchch Shiksha Loan Yojana
Below is the eligibility criteria for Haryana Higher Education Loan Scheme or Uchch Shiksha Loan Yojana

The applicant should be the permanent residence of Haryana.
The applicant should be at least 12th passed.
The benefit of the scheme will be provided only to the girl students in the state.
The age of girl should be 18 years or above.
The financial assistance would be provided only for higher studies.

According to the official data, the literacy rate in Haryana is 67.91 percent, which is higher than the National average of 64.80 percent. The literacy rate for males is 78.49 percent and females is 55.73 percent which is also higher than the national average.

The literacy rate among SC / ST is 55.45 percent which is lower than the national average. Literacy rate among SC / ST female is only 42.26 percent. However, male literacy (66.93 percent) is much higher than the female literacy among SC / ST.

scheme_name: Enrollment Period for PMSBY
description: The premium of Rs. 12 will be deducted from the account holder’s savings bank account through ‘auto-debit’ facility on or before 1st June each year for the coverage of one year. And the government will deposit the insurance cover to the beneficiary’s account through the direct credit policy. The insurance coverage would be for one year period stretching from 1 June to 31 May. Consent form to join, pay, auto-debit from the designated savings bank account on the prescribed forms will be required to be given by the beneficiary by May 31 of every year.
full_text:
Enrollment Period for PMSBY
The premium of Rs. 12 will be deducted from the account holder’s savings bank account through ‘auto-debit’ facility on or before 1st June each year for the coverage of one year. And the government will deposit the insurance cover to the beneficiary’s account through the direct credit policy.
The insurance coverage would be for one year period stretching from 1 June to 31 May.
Consent form to join, pay, auto-debit from the designated savings bank account on the prescribed forms will be required to be given by the beneficiary by May 31 of every year.

scheme_name: Features of Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana
description: Builders or the land owners can build housing society or colony in 2 acre to 10 acres of land. Government will not acquire land for the builders, but the builders have to purchase the land themselves. Land owners will have the freedom to sell their land at the market rate. The CLU will be approved within 90 days after the application. Farmers will also be allowed to develop housing units on their land. Builders will be allowed to develop colonies in 25 acres of area instead of previous minimum of 100 acres.
full_text:
Features of Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana
Builders or the land owners can build housing society or colony in 2 acre to 10 acres of land.
Government will not acquire land for the builders, but the builders have to purchase the land themselves.
Land owners will have the freedom to sell their land at the market rate.
The CLU will be approved within 90 days after the application.
Farmers will also be allowed to develop housing units on their land.
Builders will be allowed to develop colonies in 25 acres of area instead of previous minimum of 100 acres.
2 Lakh homes will be constructed in the state under the scheme by the year 2022.

More details about the Deen Dayal Jan Awas Yojana can be found at the link below
OR you can download the official policy document from the website of TCP Haryana at www.tcpharyana.gov.in

scheme_name: Features of Haryana Parivar Pehchan Patra
description: Through the Parivar Pehchan Patra Scheme, the state government would be able to digitize the records of Haryana state resident families and keep track of them.About 56 Families residing in the state would be covered under the scheme. Out of those about 46 Lakh families are already covered in SECC-2011 list while the rest would be registered as new families.The scheme will help in increasing the transparency of government schemes, help reduce the corruption and eliminate the rising problem of duplicate Aadhar cards in the state.Family ID card has become mandatory for all government employees of the state, hence they will have to apply for the ID as soon as possible.
full_text:
Features of Haryana Parivar Pehchan Patra
Through the Parivar Pehchan Patra Scheme, the state government would be able to digitize the records of Haryana state resident families and keep track of them.About 56 Families residing in the state would be covered under the scheme. Out of those about 46 Lakh families are already covered in SECC-2011 list while the rest would be registered as new families.The scheme will help in increasing the transparency of government schemes, help reduce the corruption and eliminate the rising problem of duplicate Aadhar cards in the state.Family ID card has become mandatory for all government employees of the state, hence they will have to apply for the ID as soon as possible.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance Under PMAY-G
description: The central government would be providing a financial assistance of Rs. Rs. 120,000 in plain areas and Rs. 130,000 in eastern, hilly and IAP areas to the beneficiaries. Along with this, an additional Rs. 12000 will also be provided to build toilet to each beneficiary under the Swachch Bharat Mission. The beneficiaries will also be provided daily wages of up to 90-95 days (Rs. 18000) through MGNREGA. Hence, the total financial assistance amount will be 1 Lakh 50 thousand for plain areas and 1 Lakh 60 thousand for eastern, hilly and IAP areas. Interested beneficiaries can also avail a loan of upto Rs. 70000 from any of the nationalized banks for the construction of home.
full_text:
Financial Assistance Under PMAY-G
The central government would be providing a financial assistance of Rs. Rs. 120,000 in plain areas and Rs. 130,000 in eastern, hilly and IAP areas to the beneficiaries. Along with this, an additional Rs. 12000 will also be provided to build toilet to each beneficiary under the Swachch Bharat Mission. The beneficiaries will also be provided daily wages of up to 90-95 days (Rs. 18000) through MGNREGA.
Hence, the total financial assistance amount will be 1 Lakh 50 thousand for plain areas and 1 Lakh 60 thousand for eastern, hilly and IAP areas. Interested beneficiaries can also avail a loan of upto Rs. 70000 from any of the nationalized banks for the construction of home.
Selection of beneficiaries under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Gramin will be done on the basis of SECC-2011 data. The government has also launched AwaasApp for beneficiaries to know the status of their application, funding or share the progress of construction.
To know more about the PMAY-G, please visit the following links

At first, the farmers have to inform the insurance company, bank, concerned state government officer, or at the toll free number of insurance company within 72 hours of the loss / damage of corps.Bank / concerned state government officer will forward the information to the insurance company.The insurance company will appoint damage surveyor within next 72 hours.The survey of the damage of crops will be done within next 10 days.Payment of insured amount will be received within 15 days after the completion of survey.
full_text:
For Rabi Crops: 31st DecemberFor Kharif Crops: 31st July
However, actual last date of PMFBY application can be obtained from the official portal / nearest CSC center / insurance company or the agriculture officer or the banks in your area.
How to Claim Insurance Amount Under PMFBY
Below is the complete procedure to report the loss of crops and claim the insurance amount from the insurance company.
At first, the farmers have to inform the insurance company, bank, concerned state government officer, or at the toll free number of insurance company within 72 hours of the loss / damage of corps.Bank / concerned state government officer will forward the information to the insurance company.The insurance company will appoint damage surveyor within next 72 hours.The survey of the damage of crops will be done within next 10 days.Payment of insured amount will be received within 15 days after the completion of survey.

scheme_name: Free Sewing Machine Scheme
description: Under this scheme, the state government would provide free sewing machines to 50,000 women across the state. The sewing machines under the scheme will be provided only to eligible women labourers. The main objective of distributing free sewing machines is to enable women earn more and make them self-reliant and employable.
full_text:
Free Sewing Machine Scheme
Under this scheme, the state government would provide free sewing machines to 50,000 women across the state. The sewing machines under the scheme will be provided only to eligible women labourers. The main objective of distributing free sewing machines is to enable women earn more and make them self-reliant and employable.

scheme_name: Free Solar Lantern Scheme
description: Apart from free sewing machines, 50,000 women labourers would also be provided solar lanterns free of cost. Solar lanterns would be provided only to women living in rural areas where electricity have not reached yet. The lanterns would help illuminate the houses where there is electricity facility so far.
full_text:
Free Solar Lantern Scheme
Apart from free sewing machines, 50,000 women labourers would also be provided solar lanterns free of cost. Solar lanterns would be provided only to women living in rural areas where electricity have not reached yet. The lanterns would help illuminate the houses where there is electricity facility so far.

The schemes were announced by the CM of Haryana on 18th December during an event. The CM also mentioned that out of total 59 lakh families in the state, 53 lakh have already been provided LPG gas connections and remaining 6 lakhs will also be provided soon under the Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana.
The government aims to make Haryana a Kerosene-free state very soon.

scheme_name: Guidelines for Farmers Registration at E-Kharid Portal
description: Below are the guidelines or process for registration of farmers at E-Kharid portal of Haryana:-
full_text:
Guidelines for Farmers Registration at E-Kharid Portal
Below are the guidelines or process for registration of farmers at E-Kharid portal of Haryana:-

All fields marked with “asterisk (*)” are compulsory.
Farmers must possess their 12 digit unique bio-metric ID (Aadhaar Card number).
10 digit registered mobile number is mandatory. All the information will be send at this mobile number through SMS.
Date of Birth must match with your Identity proof.
Farmers can deposit scanned copy or photocopy of any 1 of documents – Aadhaar Card, Driving Licence, Passport, Voter ID card.
Farmer must have their recent passport size photograph.
For bank details, farmer must have the first page of bank passbook with them.
Farmers must enter their correct bank account number, name of account holder, IFSC code and upload necessary documents.

Moreover, farmers will have to enter the details of crop sown accurately. They must specify the name of scheme for which form is filled, area of land (in acres), crop name, place of sowing and category of farm produce to print acknowledgement receipt.
— For more details, contact the helpline number at 1800-180-2060 (9:00 AM to 7:00 PM) or send an email at [email protected]

Content Source / Reference Link: https://ekharid.in/MMS/FarmerRegistrationOpen, https://ekharid.in/

scheme_name: Haryana Agricultural Pump (Tube Well) Connections for Farmers
description: A total number of 44,000 agricultural pumpsets connections would be issued to the farmers. Out of this, there are around 25,000 connections for small farmers and 15,000 solar pump connections. The state govt. is going to provide alternatives to the poor farmers to avail solar pump connections. As per the announcement for the CM Manohar Lal Khattar, the state govt. of Haryana will soon send demand notices to the applicants. All the applicant farmers needs to pay some fixed amount, after which the tube well connections would be issued to the farmers directly. Only those applicants, whose applications are pending since 1 January 2014 and 31 December 2018 will get these agriculture pump connections.
full_text:
Haryana Agricultural Pump (Tube Well) Connections for Farmers
A total number of 44,000 agricultural pumpsets connections would be issued to the farmers. Out of this, there are around 25,000 connections for small farmers and 15,000 solar pump connections. The state govt. is going to provide alternatives to the poor farmers to avail solar pump connections. As per the announcement for the CM Manohar Lal Khattar, the state govt. of Haryana will soon send demand notices to the applicants.
All the applicant farmers needs to pay some fixed amount, after which the tube well connections would be issued to the farmers directly. Only those applicants, whose applications are pending since 1 January 2014 and 31 December 2018 will get these agriculture pump connections.

Govt. will also install around 10 lakh smart electricity meters by DISCOMS. In the 1st phase, smart meters would be installed in Karnal and Gurgaon districts and the work of installation of 10,000 such meters have already been started in Panipat. Govt. aims to provide electricity in each house under Ujala Yojana till 31 March 2019.

मनोहर सरकार की किसानों को सौगात "समृद्ध किसान-समृद्ध हरियाणा" @mlkhattar @subhashbrala @cmohry pic.twitter.com/7cY9folTn0
— Haryana BJP (@BJP4Haryana) December 27, 2018

CM said that under the ‘Mhara Gaon Jagmag Gaon’ scheme, around 610 feeders covering 2,870 villages are getting 24 hours power supply. Under Integrated Power Development Scheme (IPDS), govt. sanctions Rs. 390.59 crore to improve power system of 47 towns. Moreover, govt. will raise the capacity of new 33 KV sub-stations, 11 KV feeders, distribution transformers and existing transformers.

हरियाणा सरकार की किसान हितेषी योजनाएं "समृद्ध किसान-समृद्ध हरियाणा" @mlkhattar @subhashbrala @cmohry pic.twitter.com/lAV5S02K2Z
— Haryana BJP (@BJP4Haryana) December 27, 2018

For the first time in the state, all the 4 power companies have emerged from losses and have earned profit. In 2017-18, UHBVN earns a profit of Rs. 278 crore and DHBVN earns profit of Rs. 134 crore. Thus the total earned profits of these 2 companies is Rs. 412 crore. To ensure welfare of farmers, the power tariff has been reduced to almost half (50%). This reduction has considerably resulted in reducing the electricity bills of domestic consumers.
There were a total number of 54,08,722 electricity connections in Haryana in FY 2014. The state govt. has issued 10,87,835 new connections during the last 4 years. Out of these, around 4,48,588 connections were given to un-electrified households in the rural area.
As the Assembly elections (scheduled in Oct 2019) and Lok Sabha elections (scheduled in May 2019) dates are coming, so the state govt. wants to lure farmers.

scheme_name: Haryana BOCW Atal Bihari Vajpayee Shramik Avagaman Yojana 2020
description: In the modern day world where all sections of society are progressing, Haryana govt. took a major step to ensure that poor also prospers. A chunk of poor people who are working as construction labourers will now get relief in travelling. Each of the construction worker can now avail Free Bus Pass Scheme benefits while going to work. The free bus passes would be provided under Haryana Atal Bihari Vajpayee Shramik Avagaman Yojana 2020. Haryana Deputy CM Dushyant Chautala said that govt. will provide bus passes, the cost of which would be borne by the state government. Construction workers would be able to commute between their residences and work places in state transport buses absolutely free of cost. He has made this announcement while chairing the 19th meeting of The Haryana Building and Others Construction Workers Welfare Board in Gurugram.
full_text:
Haryana BOCW Atal Bihari Vajpayee Shramik Avagaman Yojana 2020
In the modern day world where all sections of society are progressing, Haryana govt. took a major step to ensure that poor also prospers. A chunk of poor people who are working as construction labourers will now get relief in travelling. Each of the construction worker can now avail Free Bus Pass Scheme benefits while going to work. The free bus passes would be provided under Haryana Atal Bihari Vajpayee Shramik Avagaman Yojana 2020.
Haryana Deputy CM Dushyant Chautala said that govt. will provide bus passes, the cost of which would be borne by the state government. Construction workers would be able to commute between their residences and work places in state transport buses absolutely free of cost. He has made this announcement while chairing the 19th meeting of The Haryana Building and Others Construction Workers Welfare Board in Gurugram.

It was decided in the meeting that the scheme will be named “Atal Bihari Vajpayee Shramik Avagaman Yojana”. The cost of the workers travel in the public transport (Haryana Roadways buses) will be taken care of by the Board. Dy CM even instructed the officials of the Labour Department to outline modalities in consultation with Transport Department officials.
Dy. CM also directed Women and Child Development Department officials to run a campaign to spread awareness about sanitary napkins and hygiene among women workers. He directed the labour department officials to explore possibilities of installing Sanitary Napkin Dispensing Machines for women workers.
From now onward, Haryana government will give Rs. 1,01,000 in two installments for the marriages of labourers daughters. The 1st installment will be of Rs. 50,000 amount to be released before the wedding while 2nd installment of Rs. 51,000 will be given after the marriage ceremony.

Content Source / Reference Link: https://www.outlookindia.com/newsscroll/haryana-construction-workers-to-avail-free-travel-in-state-buses/1710257

Haryana Cyber Security Portal & Toll Free Number

Kisan Pension Yojana is applicable for small and marginal farmers and people who work as labour in farms.

scheme_name: Haryana Female Acid Attack Victim Compensation Scheme Features
description: To avail benefits, an online application must be filed either by the victim himself or on victim’s behalf where the victim is unable to make an application. The important features and highlights of this scheme are as follows:-
full_text:
Haryana Female Acid Attack Victim Compensation Scheme Features
To avail benefits, an online application must be filed either by the victim himself or on victim’s behalf where the victim is unable to make an application. The important features and highlights of this scheme are as follows:-

Any applicant who comes in the definition of disability will get financial assistance of Rs. 8,000 per month.
In addition to this, The state govt. would ensure that all the female acid attack victims would receive free medical treatment. It also includes medicine, food, bedding, plastic or reconstructive surgery from any government or government approved hospitals.
Moreover, acid attack victims would also be given preference in allotment of fair price shops by the Food and Supply Department.
Govt. will provide a financial assistance of Rs. 1 lakh to the victims within 15 days of such an incident. The concerned deputy commissioner will provide Rs. 25,000 as an adhoc relief amount. Women and Child Dept. will provide the remaining 75,000 amount within 15 days.

There is also a provision which will ensure that no medical hospital, govt. owned / privately owned can deny specialize or any form of treatment on any ground. Even to avail treatment, the police report or FIR would not be a relevant precondition. For more information, visit the official website http://prharyana.gov.in/en/

All the C & D block industries will get Rs. 3,000 per employee grant which provides employment to 50% or more local haryanavi youths. This grant would be given every month for next 3 years. The state govt. is considering such grant for industries in A & B blocks.

scheme_name: Haryana Kisan Pension 2019 for Farmers
description: After the second meeting of the committee constituted by the Haryana govt. to formulate the pension scheme for farmers in Haryana, the state govt. has decided to rollout Kisan Pension Scheme 2019 for Farmers. The issues related to age limit, amount of pension, number of farmers to be covered under the Kisan Pension Yojana were discussed at the meeting. Earlier, the 1st meeting of the committee was held last month on 27 December 2018. In the 2nd meeting, it is decided that the committee is going to submit its report to the CM very shortly. It was informed that the deputy commissioners of all the districts have been directed to send the data of the farmers within 10 days. After report submission on Kisan Pension Scheme 2019, committee can take further action on the basis of collected data.
full_text:
Haryana Kisan Pension 2019 for Farmers
After the second meeting of the committee constituted by the Haryana govt. to formulate the pension scheme for farmers in Haryana, the state govt. has decided to rollout Kisan Pension Scheme 2019 for Farmers. The issues related to age limit, amount of pension, number of farmers to be covered under the Kisan Pension Yojana were discussed at the meeting. Earlier, the 1st meeting of the committee was held last month on 27 December 2018.
In the 2nd meeting, it is decided that the committee is going to submit its report to the CM very shortly. It was informed that the deputy commissioners of all the districts have been directed to send the data of the farmers within 10 days. After report submission on Kisan Pension Scheme 2019, committee can take further action on the basis of collected data.

This decision to implement pension scheme for farmers comes after the newly elected governments in Rajasthan, Chhattisgarh and Madhya Pradesh have announced Farm Loan Waiver Scheme. After such big step towards welfare of farmers, the state govt. is under big pressure to make big announcement for farmers of Haryana.

आज चंडीगढ़ स्थित हरियाणा निवास में किसानों को पेंशन देने के मुद्दे पर हरियाणा सरकार द्वारा गठित कमेटी की बैठक की अध्यक्षता की। बैठक में विधायक श्री घमश्याम दास अरोड़ा, श्री अभय सिंह यादव, श्री पवन सैनी, श्री महिपाल ढांडा एवं कृषि विभाग के महानिदेशक श्री अजीत बालाजी जोशी शामिल रहे pic.twitter.com/cF8M8IC19i
— Subhash Barala (@subhashbrala) January 9, 2019

Moreover, the opposition parties like Congress and INLD have promised farm loan waiver scheme for farmers if they are voted to power in the assembly polls which are going to be held in October 2019.

scheme_name: Haryana Kisan Pension Yojana Application Process
description: Haryana govt. has not yet declared the online application process for Haryana Kisan Pension Yojana. In case the application process has been rolled out, then the eligible farmers can get application form from authorized website of Haryana government. The payment of first installment of premium would be deducted from PM-KISAN bank accounts of farmers in order to verify bank accounts of farmers. That amount would soon be refunded to Mukhyamantri Parivar Samriddhi Yojana (PM-KISAN Maandhan Yojana) bank accounts of farmers.
full_text:
Haryana Kisan Pension Yojana Application Process
Haryana govt. has not yet declared the online application process for Haryana Kisan Pension Yojana. In case the application process has been rolled out, then the eligible farmers can get application form from authorized website of Haryana government.
The payment of first installment of premium would be deducted from PM-KISAN bank accounts of farmers in order to verify bank accounts of farmers. That amount would soon be refunded to Mukhyamantri Parivar Samriddhi Yojana (PM-KISAN Maandhan Yojana) bank accounts of farmers.

हरियाणा के किसानों को मासिक पेंशन की सौगात pic.twitter.com/jlMGVQa03s
— CMO Haryana (@cmohry) September 8, 2019

The state govt. would organize special gram sabhas in Haryana from 9 September 2019. In these gram sabhas, the list of eligible farmers would be published. Moreover, farmers can also file complaints in these gram sabhas. In case of any grievance or any issue of list renewal, farmers can make a visit to the nearest Agriculture Development Officer.

Content Source / Reference Link: https://twitter.com/cmohry/status/1170591573953769473?s=19

scheme_name: Haryana Labour Department Assistance Scheme for Disabled Children of Labourers Conditions
description: People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Aksham Baccho Ko Vittiya Sahayata Yojana in Haryana:-
full_text:
Haryana Labour Department Assistance Scheme for Disabled Children of Labourers Conditions
People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Aksham Baccho Ko Vittiya Sahayata Yojana in Haryana:-

All the registered labourers must have minimum 1 years of membership / subscription.
In the identity certificate of the registered labourers, registration fees and subscription amount needs to be mentioned.
The children of registered labourers must be declared 50% or more physically / mentally disabled by any medical authority.

Along with the completed application form, Disability Certificate issued by medical authority must be attached.

People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana in Haryana:-

All the registered labourers must have minimum 1 years of membership / subscription.
In the identity certificate of the registered labourers, date of application and subscription amount needs to be mentioned.
All the laborers must be admitted for treatment in govt. / govt. aided hospitals for minimum 4 days to maximum 30 days. For this, they must produce a hospital certificate or proof.
This facility is not applicable for medical treatment of more than 1 month in a single year.

The labourer must be a building and construction worker and must have completed at-least 60 years of age.
In the identity certificate of the registered laborers, registration fees and updated subscription amount is to be mentioned.

All the candidates can firstly visit the official website at hrylabour.gov.in. At the homepage, go to the “E-Services” section and make registration using Aadhaar card. Haryana Labour Department Disability Assistance Scheme Conditions
People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Disabled Assistance Scheme in Haryana:-

All the labourers must be registered and have permanent membership / subscription.
In the identity certificate of the registered laborers, registration fees and updated subscription amount is to be mentioned.
Candidates must submit the permanent Disability Certificate from the Health department of Haryana govt.

All the disabled persons needs to apply online for Handicapped Assistance Scheme of Haryana Labour Department within 1 year of occurrence of disability. This assistance scheme for disabled persons has the main motto to create the best environment for the registered workers.

description: People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Family Pension Scheme in Haryana:-
full_text:
Haryana Labour Department Family Pension Scheme Conditions
People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Family Pension Scheme in Haryana:-

At the time of death of labour pensioner, their dependent husband / wife will receive half of the pension amount per month as Family Pension Scheme of Haryana Labour department.
Candidates must submit the completed and verified identity certificate along with claim form. This ID certificate must contain the details of the submitted subscription amount and needs to be attached.

There is a provision that on the death of the pensioner worker, the pension which was being given to him would now be given to his dependent family member (half of amount) under Family Pension Scheme.

Content Source / Reference Link: hrylabour.gov.in

scheme_name: Haryana Labour Department Free Travel Facility Scheme Conditions
description: People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Muft Bhraman Suvidha Scheme in Haryana:-
full_text:
Haryana Labour Department Free Travel Facility Scheme Conditions
People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Muft Bhraman Suvidha Scheme in Haryana:-

All the registered labourers must have minimum 2 years of membership / subscription.
The actual fare ticket must be attached.
In the identity certificate of the registered labourer, registration fees and subscription amount is to be mentioned.

This facility will remain applicable for 1 time in 4 years duration. Free Travel Facility Scheme 2019 is available for all registered workers of the Haryana state. Moreover, the duration of visit to the religion (pilgrimage) and historical places must not exceed 10 days.

Content Source / Reference Link: hrylabour.gov.in

scheme_name: Haryana Labour Department House Purchase / Construction Loan Scheme Conditions
description: People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board House Purchase / Construction Loan Scheme in Haryana:-
full_text:
Haryana Labour Department House Purchase / Construction Loan Scheme Conditions
People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board House Purchase / Construction Loan Scheme in Haryana:-

All the registered labourers must have minimum 5 years of membership / subscription.
The age of registered labourers must be at-least 8 years less than 60 years.
The maximum age of construction workers must be 52 years so that he / she can repay loan amount in the next 8 years.
This facility will remain applicable for 1 time in a lifetime.

Labour Welfare Fund House Purchase / Construction Loan Scheme 2019 is available for all registered workers of the Haryana state.

Content Source / Reference Link: hrylabour.gov.in

scheme_name: Haryana Labour Disability Assistance Scheme 2019
description: Haryana Labour Welfare Fund Disability Assistance Scheme 2019 aims to provide financial assistance of Rs. 1.5 lakh to 3 lakh to the registered labourers. This amount would be given as one time settlement and the assistance would be given on the permanent disability percentage. For upto 50% handicapped percentage, the assistance amount is Rs. 1.5 lakh. For 51% to 75% disability percentage, assistance amount is Rs. 2 lakh and for 76% and above disability percentage, assistance amount is Rs. 3 lakh.
full_text:
Haryana Labour Disability Assistance Scheme 2019
Haryana Labour Welfare Fund Disability Assistance Scheme 2019 aims to provide financial assistance of Rs. 1.5 lakh to 3 lakh to the registered labourers. This amount would be given as one time settlement and the assistance would be given on the permanent disability percentage. For upto 50% handicapped percentage, the assistance amount is Rs. 1.5 lakh. For 51% to 75% disability percentage, assistance amount is Rs. 2 lakh and for 76% and above disability percentage, assistance amount is Rs. 3 lakh.

scheme_name: Haryana Labour Disabled Pension Scheme for Persons with Disabilities Conditions
description: People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Disabled Pension Scheme in Haryana:-
full_text:
Haryana Labour Disabled Pension Scheme for Persons with Disabilities Conditions
People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Disabled Pension Scheme in Haryana:-

All the labourers must be registered with at-least 1 year membership / subscription.
In the identity certificate of the registered laborers, registration fees and updated subscription amount is to be mentioned.
Candidates must produced Disability Certificate (70% to 100% permanent disability) issued by the Health department of Haryana.

All the disabled persons needs to apply online within 1 year of occuring of disability.

Content Source / Reference Link: hrylabour.gov.in

scheme_name: Haryana Labour Kanyadan Yojna 2019 for Daughter’s Marriage
description: Kanyadaan Yojana in Haryana is being implemented by the Labour Department in which govt. provides assistance of Rs. 51,000 on marriage of daughter’s of labourers. The official website of Kanyadan Yojna in Haryana is hrylabour.gov.in from where people will get complete information. To know complete details, candidates can go to the “BOCW Welfare Schemes” section and then click at the “कन्यादान योजना (विवाह से तीन दिन पूर्व)(धारा 22(1)(h))” or directly click the link – Kanyadan Yojna in Haryana. full_text:
Haryana Labour Welfare Board Marriage Assistance Scheme Form 2019
Haryana Labour Welfare Board Marriage Assistance Scheme 2019 aims to provide financial assistance of Rs. 50,000 to registered labourers on their daughter’s marriage.
1. Labour Welfare Board Marriage Assistance Scheme Online Registration in Haryana
All the candidates can firstly visit the official website at hrylabour.gov.in. At the homepage, go to the “E-Services” section and make registration using Aadhaar card. Then make a login at the homepage of the official Labour dept. website and fill the Haryana Labour Welfare Board Marriage Assistance Scheme online registration form.

To read the complete scheme details, click at the link – Haryana Labour Welfare Board Marriage Assistance Scheme 2019
2. Conditions to Avail Labour Welfare Board Marriage Assistance Scheme
People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Marriage Assistance Scheme in Haryana:-

All the labourers must be registered with at-least 1 year membership / subscription.
The complete details including application form number with identity certificate copy containing date of submission of application form must be produced.
Marriage registration certificate is an essential document.
All the candidates must also produce a self declaration certificate that he / she has will not get any assistance from any other govt. dept. / board / nigam.

Haryana Labour Welfare Fund Maternity Benefit Scheme 2019 aims to provide financial assistance of Rs. 36,000 to the registered labourers on the birth of children.
1. Labour Welfare Fund Maternity Benefit Scheme Online Registration in Haryana
All the candidates can firstly visit the official website at hrylabour.gov.in. At the homepage, go to the “E-Services” section and make registration using Aadhaar card. Then make a login at the homepage of the official Labour dept. website and fill the Haryana Labour Welfare Fund Maternity Benefit Scheme online registration form.

To read the complete scheme details, click at the link – Haryana Labour Welfare Fund Maternity Benefit Scheme 2019
2. Conditions to Avail Maternity Benefit Scheme Haryana Labor
People can follow the below mentioned conditions to avail financial aid under Labour Welfare Board Maternity Benefit Scheme in Haryana:-

All the women labourers must be registered with at-least 1 year membership / subscription.
After the birth of the children, candidates must produce birth certificate (certified copy) must be attached.
Matritva Labh is given upto 2 children but in case the children are girls, then this maternity benefit can be availed for upto 3 daughters.
Completed application forms along with other documents must be submitted to the concerned authorities within 1 year of delivery.
All those registered women labourers whose husband is taking paternity benefits from any board / dept. / corporation are not eligible.

3. Eligibility Criteria for Haryana Labour Board Maternity Benefit Scheme

Eligibility Criteria

Membership Years / सदस्यता वर्ष

upto 5

scheme_name: Haryana Mera Goan Mera Gaurav (My Village My Pride) Portal
description: The Rural Development Department is going to launch Mera Gaon Mera Gaurav portal to raise CSR contribution from corporate houses as sense of service rather then obligation. This portal will connect the people with their villages and various developmental works would be listed on the website that could be taken up by the industrial houses and corporates. At Haryana CSR Summit 2018 organized on 12 November, CM urges the industrial and corporate houses to raise their CSR contribution from 2 per cent to 5 per cent of their profits and partner the state govt. in speedy execution of various CSR projects. At present, the annual contribution under CSR in the state is Rs. 350 crore and target has been fixed to increase it to Rs. 1000 crore.
full_text:
Haryana Mera Goan Mera Gaurav (My Village My Pride) Portal
The Rural Development Department is going to launch Mera Gaon Mera Gaurav portal to raise CSR contribution from corporate houses as sense of service rather then obligation. This portal will connect the people with their villages and various developmental works would be listed on the website that could be taken up by the industrial houses and corporates.
At Haryana CSR Summit 2018 organized on 12 November, CM urges the industrial and corporate houses to raise their CSR contribution from 2 per cent to 5 per cent of their profits and partner the state govt. in speedy execution of various CSR projects. At present, the annual contribution under CSR in the state is Rs. 350 crore and target has been fixed to increase it to Rs. 1000 crore.

At CSR Summit 2018 in Haryana, chief minister also honoured corporates, public enterprises and deputy commissioners for outstanding contribution in CSR space in Haryana through Haryana CSR Awards 2018.

हरियाणा में CSR के फंड से एक हजार करोड़ के जनहितकारी कार्यों को अंजाम दिया जाएगा। हमारी सरकार जल्द ही 'मेरा गांव- मेरा गौरव' नाम का पोर्टल भी लांच करने जा रही है जिसके तहत हरियाणा मूल के उद्योग व साधन संपन्न व्यक्ति अपने पैतृक गाँव में CSR के तहत विकास कार्यों में सहयोग कर सकेंगे pic.twitter.com/HtiK855tik
— Vipul Goel (@VipulGoelBJP) November 13, 2018

उद्योग जगत के लोगों से अपने लाभ का C.S.R. में 2% से 5% तक योगदान देने का मुख्यमंत्री ने किया आह्नान। pic.twitter.com/LBUwQiqdUc
— CMO Haryana (@cmohry) November 13, 2018

CM Khattar has also expressed grief over the sad demise of Union Fertilizer and Chemicals and Parliamentary Affairs Minister, Sh. Anananth Kumar who was suffering from cancer and his demise is a huge loss to the nation.

scheme_name: Haryana Muft Laptop Yojana Implementation
description: Education Department of Haryana will also prepare list of BPL students. The state govt. will distribute free laptops to students – both boys and girls – of economically weaker sections of all communities whose annual family income falls below Rs. 2.5 lakh. The dept. will verify records of these students and will prepare list of beneficiaries after verifying their family income and other admission records by end of this month. Haryana govt. has issued circular to all government schools about the Free Laptop Distribution Scheme. Previously in July, Haryana govt. has issued notification to all districts about a similar scheme. However, that Free Laptop Scheme was not implemented as list was not prepared by a few districts. This Muft Laptop Yojana will encourage students to secure good marks in the board examinations.
full_text:
Haryana Muft Laptop Yojana Implementation
Education Department of Haryana will also prepare list of BPL students. The state govt. will distribute free laptops to students – both boys and girls – of economically weaker sections of all communities whose annual family income falls below Rs. 2.5 lakh. The dept. will verify records of these students and will prepare list of beneficiaries after verifying their family income and other admission records by end of this month.
Haryana govt. has issued circular to all government schools about the Free Laptop Distribution Scheme. Previously in July, Haryana govt. has issued notification to all districts about a similar scheme. However, that Free Laptop Scheme was not implemented as list was not prepared by a few districts. This Muft Laptop Yojana will encourage students to secure good marks in the board examinations.

scheme_name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Parivar Samman Nidhi Yojana 2019
description: The category wise details and assistance amount under Mukhyamantri Parivar Samman Nidhi Yojana in Haryana has been described as follows:-
full_text:
Haryana Mukhyamantri Parivar Samman Nidhi Yojana 2019
The category wise details and assistance amount under Mukhyamantri Parivar Samman Nidhi Yojana in Haryana has been described as follows:-

First Category – For beneficiaries in the age group of 18 to 40 years of age, there are 4 options as described below:-

In the 1st option, the families will get Rs. 6,000 per annum which is going to be deposited in 3 equal installments of Rs. 2,000 in the bank account of the head of the family.
In the 2nd option, each family will have to nominate a member to avail the scheme benefit. All the beneficiaries will get Rs. 36,000 after completion of 5 years.
Under the 3rd option, each nominated beneficiary will get pension of Rs. 3,000 to Rs. 15,000 per month on attaining the age of 60 years. This amount will depend on the age of beneficiaries at the start of the scheme.
Under the 4th option, each nominated beneficiary will get Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 30,000 after 5 years. This would depend on the option selected by the nominated beneficiary. The nominated beneficiaries can choose the option of insurance cover under the current Mukhyamantri Parivar Samman Nidhi Yojana. The premium for this would be paid by the state government.

Second Category – For beneficiaries in the age group of 40 to 60 years, there would be 2 options:-

In the 1st option, beneficiaries can opt for Rs. 6,000 every year which is going to be deposited in 3 equal installments of Rs. 2,000 each. This amount would be transferred directly into the bank accounts of the head of the family.
In the 2nd option, the nominated beneficiary would get Rs 36,000 after every 5 year.

Mukhyamantri Parivar Samman Nidhi Yojana in Haryana also includes an insurance of Rs. 2 lakh on natural death, insurance of Rs. 2 lakh for accidental death, insurance of Rs. 2 lakh for permanent disability and insurance of Rs. 1 lakh for partial disability.

In addition to this, if the nominated beneficiary is also covered under PM Shram-Yogi Maandhan Yojana, then on attaining the age of 60 years, he / she will also get pension of Rs. 3,000 per month.

किसानों, कारीगरों और श्रमिकों को सालाना 6,000 रुपए देगी हरियाणा सरकार pic.twitter.com/xbp93373p9
— CMO Haryana (@cmohry) February 27, 2019

The state govt. of Haryana has already allocated Rs. 1500 crore for the successful implementation of the Mukhyamantri Parivar Samman Nidhi Yojana.

scheme_name: Haryana Old Age / Widow / Disabled Pension Amount Raised to Rs. 2000
description: In Haryana, the state govt. has hiked the Old Age Samman Allowance, Widow Pension, Disabled Pension, Ladli Social Security Allowance and Allowance to Dwarf and Eunuchs to Rs. 2000 per month (earlier Rs. 1800). After the implementation of this decision, govt. will incur an expenditure of Rs. 20,768.68 lakh on pension for next 4 months (Nov 2018 to Feb 2019). This decision will benefit a total number of 25,99,606 beneficiaries. Till date, there are 15,70,995 beneficiaries of Old Age Samman Allowance, 6,90,587 beneficiaries of widow pension, 1,53,989 beneficiaries of disabled pension, 35,114 beneficiaries of ladli social security allowance, 28 of dwarf allowance and 30 of eunuch allowance. All these beneficiaries will now get montly pension of Rs. 2000 from 1st November.
full_text:
Haryana Old Age / Widow / Disabled Pension Amount Raised to Rs. 2000
In Haryana, the state govt. has hiked the Old Age Samman Allowance, Widow Pension, Disabled Pension, Ladli Social Security Allowance and Allowance to Dwarf and Eunuchs to Rs. 2000 per month (earlier Rs. 1800). After the implementation of this decision, govt. will incur an expenditure of Rs. 20,768.68 lakh on pension for next 4 months (Nov 2018 to Feb 2019).
This decision will benefit a total number of 25,99,606 beneficiaries. Till date, there are 15,70,995 beneficiaries of Old Age Samman Allowance, 6,90,587 beneficiaries of widow pension, 1,53,989 beneficiaries of disabled pension, 35,114 beneficiaries of ladli social security allowance, 28 of dwarf allowance and 30 of eunuch allowance. All these beneficiaries will now get montly pension of Rs. 2000 from 1st November.

In addition to this, the state govt. has also raised the financial assistance for Destitute Children & Non-School Going Disabled Children. The assistance for 1,34,539 Destitute Children will now be increased to Rs. 1,100 from Rs. 990 per month. Moreover, the financial assistance for 10,314 Non-school going Disabled Children would be increased to Rs. 1,400 from Rs. 1,200 per month.

scheme_name: Haryana Parali Incentive Scheme to Curb Stubble Burning
description: Parali (Stubble) burning has become a major cause of pollution in recent days. Many farmers in Haryana and Punjab burns their stubble in order to get their farm land ready for next season cultivation. The smoke emission from parali burning contains pollutants and is choking nearby state Delhi. The NCT of Delhi is just like gas chamber these days due to harmful levels of Air Quality Index (AQI). PM 2.5 & PM 10 levels in national capital are beyond hazardous level due to parali burning. SC has already put a ban on burning of stubble in these 2 states, but the no. of incidents of stubble burning are not reducing. This is because farmers are poor in both Haryana and Punjab states.
full_text:
Haryana Parali Incentive Scheme to Curb Stubble Burning
Parali (Stubble) burning has become a major cause of pollution in recent days. Many farmers in Haryana and Punjab burns their stubble in order to get their farm land ready for next season cultivation. The smoke emission from parali burning contains pollutants and is choking nearby state Delhi. The NCT of Delhi is just like gas chamber these days due to harmful levels of Air Quality Index (AQI).
PM 2.5 & PM 10 levels in national capital are beyond hazardous level due to parali burning. SC has already put a ban on burning of stubble in these 2 states, but the no. of incidents of stubble burning are not reducing. This is because farmers are poor in both Haryana and Punjab states.

The parali machine price is not affordable as it costs around 15 lakh per machine even after getting subsidy from central govt. Moreover, the rent of parali machine is too high for farmers which they cannot afford. So to reduce the level of pollution in Delhi, Supreme Court has ordered Punjab and Haryana state govt’s to provide incentives to farmers.

राज्य के छोटे और सीमांत किसानों को पराली न जलाने के लिए 100 रुपये प्रति क्विंटल की प्रोत्साहन राशि प्रदान करेगी हरियाणा सरकार pic.twitter.com/lfnGooqEe4
— CMO Haryana (@cmohry) November 12, 2019

In lines with SC order, Haryana govt. has decided to start Parali Incentive Scheme 2019. Under this scheme, the state govt. will provide Rs. 100 per quintal to small and marginal farmers who have not burned stubble.

Content Source / Reference Link: https://www.business-standard.com/article/pti-stories/hry-govt-likely-to-provide-rs-100-quintal-support-to-small-marginal-farmers-from-saturday-119110801643_1.html

To get Parivar Pehchan Patra (unique identity certificate) in Haryana, the head of the family will have to deposit a form. This Parivar Pehchan Patra Apply online form must contain the full details of the family with signature of head of family.

Haryana Parivar Pehchan Patra – FAQ’s

scheme_name: Haryana Parivar Pehchan Patra (Family Identity Certificate)
description: After the updation of data of family on the basis of residence, death and birth, the state government is consistently working to update data of families on the basis of SECC-2011 data. Till date, there are around 54 lakh families in the state which would get included in the updated database. To apply for Parivar Pehchan Patra in Haryana, all the people needs to fill the application form and submit it to the concerned authorities. CM has instructed all the officials to keep a performa of Family Identity Certificate in their offices. The application forms for Parivar Pehchan Patra will remain available at all the SDM offices, tehsil & block offices, schools, ration depot, gas agencies and other offices which deals with the general public.
full_text:
Haryana Parivar Pehchan Patra (Family Identity Certificate)
After the updation of data of family on the basis of residence, death and birth, the state government is consistently working to update data of families on the basis of SECC-2011 data. Till date, there are around 54 lakh families in the state which would get included in the updated database. To apply for Parivar Pehchan Patra in Haryana, all the people needs to fill the application form and submit it to the concerned authorities.
CM has instructed all the officials to keep a performa of Family Identity Certificate in their offices. The application forms for Parivar Pehchan Patra will remain available at all the SDM offices, tehsil & block offices, schools, ration depot, gas agencies and other offices which deals with the general public.

This availability of Haryana Parivar Pehchan Patra application forms at public dealing offices would ensure that people who comes to these offices to take benefits of government schemes can update their family details. Moreover, the state govt. is also working to simplify the process of making of birth certificate, death certificate and marriage registration certificate.

अब हर परिवार का होगा पहचान पत्र; भ्रष्टाचार पर लगेगा अंकुश। pic.twitter.com/AdmUeawY5W
— CMO Haryana (@cmohry) January 2, 2019

The data would be used by the departments to give benefit of various welfare services to its actual beneficiary. This family identity certificate would also remove duplication as Aadhaar number and phone number of the beneficiary would also be updated in the ‘Parivar Pehchan Patra’ performa.
The information regarding various govt. schemes must reach the people. For instance, if a person reaches the age of 60 years, then he / she must information that they now becomes eligible for Old Age Pension Scheme in Haryana. Similarly if any youth attains the age of 18 years, then he / she must get information about he / she is eligible for voting.
